subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter from Qazvin was received, and the names thou hadst written were possible [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب شما از قزوین رسید و اسامی که مرقوم نموده بودید ممکن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
